Effect: Code changes have no effect — guidance behavior appears unchanged
Cause: Cached bytecode not invalidated after source edit
Controls: Documented recurring issue in development; mitigated by manual cache clear command before each run; automated in run script

Effect: Guidance cannot respond to target maneuver in terminal phase
Cause: Closing velocity too high (Vc > 600 m/s) generating N·Vc·ω exceeding accel limit
Controls: XY and Z channels limited independently (10g XY, 5g Z); first-order lag τ=0.1s smooths transitions; accel_limit_g parameter in run_engagement()

Effect: Missile dives or climbs through target altitude — pure altitude miss
Cause: Decoupled vertical channel P-controller gain mismatch; large initial altitude error
Controls: P-controller gain 0.015 tuned against nominal engagement; gravity compensation term added; alt_err logged in verbose mode; documented modeling limitation

Effect: Drag underpredicted at high AoA during boost phase — range overpredicted
Cause: aero_interpolator.get_CD(mach, 0.0) called with fixed α=0
Controls: Point mass model assumption — documented in Project 04 and Project 06 READMEs; drag error bounded by α range during engagement (<5° for most flight phases)

Effect: Guidance commands go to zero — missile flies ballistic
Cause: Target exits FOV (>90° off boresight) or range < 800m with high LOS rate
Controls: FOV check in true_pn(); R_check guard disabled inside 800m; seeker_valid flag terminates engagement post-CPA

Failure Mode: DATCOM method coverage gap at supersonic low-AR fins
Effect: CN/CA absent at M=1.6–3.0 — drag only, no normal force at supersonic speeds
Cause: DATCOM wing method does not converge on CN/CA for low aspect ratio fins at supersonic Mach
Controls: Documented in Project 04 README; CN approximated as CL at low AoA; engagement Mach range 0.5–2.0 partially outside validated database; future work: Fluent spot-checks

Effect: Spurious LOS rate commands cause lateral oscillation, miss distance increases
Cause: High noise_std (ECM or hardware degradation)
Controls: Gaussian noise model with σ=0.05 rad/s nominal; ECM scenario (5× noise) run in monte_carlo.py; accel limiter caps command magnitude

Failure Mode: First-order lag too slow (τ too large)
Effect: Guidance command cannot respond in terminal phase; missile overshoots CPA
Cause: τ=0.1s eats 18% of tgo at R=327m, Vc=587m/s
Controls: τ=0.1s validated against single engagement; tgo estimated from R/Vc at each verbose timestep; documented modeling limitation — real autopilot bandwidth higher

Effect: Missile decelerates, drag rises relative to speed — guidance authority drops
Cause: Target range > effective powered range; sustainer cutoff at t=15s
Controls: t_sustain=15s covers nominal 4km engagement (CPA at ~9s); Pk vs range plot shows degradation beyond 5km; launch envelope heatmap identifies no-go zones

Effect: Terminal phase oscillation, actuator saturation, ground-diving trajectory
Cause: Overaggressive gain; no gain scheduling in terminal phase
Controls: Accel limit 10g caps command; sensitivity analysis confirms degradation above N=6; single engagement verbose logging detects oscillation

Effect: Integration error accumulates — trajectory and miss distance inaccurate
Cause: dt increased for speed without checking numerical stability
Controls: dt=0.02s nominal; single engagement result stable at dt=0.01s and dt=0.02s; increasing to dt=0.05s shows visible trajectory deviation — threshold documented

Failure Mode: Insufficient runs for stable CEP estimate
Effect: CEP50/Pk statistics unreliable — misleading performance assessment
Cause: N_RUNS reduced to 50 for speed without noting statistical uncertainty
Controls: N_RUNS=500 for final results; 50-run test mode flagged in code comments; CEP50 variance ~±30m between 50-run and 500-run confirmed by comparison

Effect: Lateral force at launch creates initial heading error
Cause: Not modeled — thrust assumed along velocity vector
Controls: Documented assumption in README limitations; launch azimuth jitter ±5° in Monte Carlo partially captures effect

Effect: EKF propagates on IMU only — position error grows at ~0.5 m/s²
Cause: GPS jamming or signal blockage
Controls: Not explicitly modeled; IMU-only propagation error bounded by process noise Q; GPS update rate 10 Hz provides frequent corrections; ECM study covers seeker jamming

Effect: State estimate drifts — guidance law receives incorrect missile position/velocity
Cause: Process noise Q undertuned during 3000N boost phase (0–2s)
Controls: EKF RMSE 1.11m validated in Project 06 over full trajectory; residuals zero-mean, bounded ±3m; Q/R sensitivity analysis in Project 05

Effect: SciPy extrapolates — unphysical CD/CL values corrupt trajectory
Cause: Missile decelerates to M < 0.8 or accelerates to M > 3.0
Controls: Mach clipped to [0.8, 3.0] in engagement.py missile_derivatives(); CD=0.3 fallback if NaN returned; Mach range 0.5–2.0 in nominal engagement stays within clip

Effect: Insufficient lateral acceleration to intercept maneuvering target
Cause: Incorrect parameter selection
Controls: Sensitivity analysis in plot_sensitivity() sweeps N=2–6; N=5 selected as optimal; test_guidance.py Test 8 validates TPN outperforms baseline

Effect: Loss of fin — aerodynamic instability, tumbling
Cause: Setback load exceeds yield at tab-fin fillet
Controls: Project 02 FEA: SF 660× at RT, 173× at 249°C (Project 07) — no credible failure path under 10,000g; Richardson extrapolation confirms mesh-independent result

Effect: High-cycle fatigue — fin failure during or after burn
Cause: Motor burn PSD overlaps fin Mode 1 frequency
Controls: Project 07 Modal: Mode 1 = 415 Hz; typical SRM fundamental < 100 Hz — no overlap; Random vibration SF 24× at 3σ MIL-STD-810; infinite fatigue life (1e8 cycles)

Effect: Structural degradation or separation at high Mach
Cause: Aeroheating at tip exceeds Ti-6Al-4V service temperature
Controls: Project 07: peak nose tip 129°C vs Ti-6Al-4V service ~300°C; SF 789× combined stress; DKR method conservative (overpredicts heat flux at M=1.25)
